tests.test_data_collection_app_updater module

tests.test_data_collection_app_updater.dca_updater() → DataCollectionAppUpdater
tests.test_data_collection_app_updater.mock_csv_data() → DataFrame

Fixture to provide mock DataFrame data.

tests.test_data_collection_app_updater.mock_schema_content() → str

Fixture for a sample JavaScript feed schema file content.

tests.test_data_collection_app_updater.mock_user_feed() → dict[str, list[Any]]

Fixture for sample user feed data.

tests.test_data_collection_app_updater.sample_dropdown_data() → dict[str, list[Any]]

Fixture for sample dropdown data.

tests.test_data_collection_app_updater.test_update_first_property_with_enum() → None

Test update_first_property_with_enum with a single case covering all logic.

tests.test_data_collection_app_updater.test_modify_items_schema(mocker: MockerFixture, input_schema: dict[str, Any], expected_schema: dict[str, Any], sample_dropdown_data: dict[str, list[Any]]) → None

Test modify_items_schema with multiple schema structures.

tests.test_data_collection_app_updater.test_gather_feed_data(mocker: MockerFixture, mock_csv_data: DataFrame, dca_updater: DataCollectionAppUpdater) → None

Test gather_feed_data method using patch.object and mocker.

tests.test_data_collection_app_updater.test_update_feed_schema(mocker: MockerFixture, mock_schema_content: str, mock_user_feed: dict[str, list[Any]], dca_updater: DataCollectionAppUpdater) → None

Test update_feed_schema using mocker.

tests.test_data_collection_app_updater.test_init() → None

Tests that DataCollectionAppUpdater is initialized correctly.

tests.test_data_collection_app_updater.test_update_data_collection_app(dca_updater: DataCollectionAppUpdater, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Tests that DCA Updater subroutines are called correctly.

tests.test_data_collection_app_updater.test_rewrite_schemas(dca_updater: DataCollectionAppUpdater, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Tests that metadata properties are correctly grabbed and have schema written for them.

tests.test_data_collection_app_updater.test_rewrite_index_page(dca_updater: DataCollectionAppUpdater, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Tests that the index page of the Data Collection App is properly rewritten.

tests.test_data_collection_app_updater.test_get_list_of_options(dca_updater: DataCollectionAppUpdater, pattern: str, expected: list[str]) → None

Tests that list of options are produced correctly from a Regex filter.

tests.test_data_collection_app_updater.test_get_list_of_options_error(dca_updater: DataCollectionAppUpdater, pattern: str) → None

Tests that an incorrectly structured Regex pattern produces an error.

tests.test_data_collection_app_updater.test_create_string_schema(dca_updater: DataCollectionAppUpdater, mocker: MockerFixture, title: str, properties: dict[str, Any], schema: dict[str, Any]) → None

Tests that created string schema correctly handles a valid string property.

tests.test_data_collection_app_updater.test_create_string_schema_value_error(dca_updater: DataCollectionAppUpdater, mocker: MockerFixture, title: str, properties: dict[str, Any], schema: dict[str, Any]) → None

Tests that create_string_schema handles value errors appropriately.

tests.test_data_collection_app_updater.test_create_number_schema(dca_updater: DataCollectionAppUpdater, title: str, properties: dict[str, Any], schema: dict[str, Any]) → None

Tests that number schema are created correctly.

tests.test_data_collection_app_updater.test_create_bool_schema(dca_updater: DataCollectionAppUpdater, title: str, properties: dict[str, Any], schema: dict[str, Any]) → None

Tests that boolean schema are created correctly.

tests.test_data_collection_app_updater.test_create_array_schema(dca_updater: DataCollectionAppUpdater, title: str, properties: dict[str, Any], schema: dict[str, Any]) → None

Tests that array schema is created correctly.

tests.test_data_collection_app_updater.test_create_object_schema(dca_updater: DataCollectionAppUpdater, title: str, properties: dict[str, Any], schema: dict[str, Any]) → None

Tests that object schema are created correctly.

tests.test_data_collection_app_updater.test_parse_variable_name_into_title(dca_updater: DataCollectionAppUpdater, name: str, expected: str) → None

Tests that names partially or all in snake case are converted into more readable names.
